result:
**Goal: Add a Smoothed Particle Hydrodynamics (SPH) simulation mode.**

This project already has 60+ simulation modes in a single-file terminal simulation engine, including grid-based fluid dynamics (Navier-Stokes, Lattice Boltzmann) and particle systems (Boids, N-Body). An SPH mode would fill a gap by simulating fluid as free-moving particles with pressure/viscosity forces — producing dam breaks, splashing, and free-surface flows that the existing grid-based fluid sims can't capture. It fits naturally alongside the existing particle and physics simulation modes.
